title: NovaBank Freelancer Card — Practical Variant A
creative_text:
Headline:
One card for your freelance income and expenses.

Body:
Receive client payments, separate work expenses and keep your freelance finances clear in one simple account.

CTA:
Open your freelancer account.

brand_context.name: NovaBank
brand_context.tone_of_voice: Clear, practical, trustworthy, calm, not aggressive.
brand_context.target_audience: Freelancers, self-employed professionals and small business owners who need simple financial tools.
brand_context.restrictions: No exaggerated claims. No 'guaranteed income'. No 'zero risk'. No pressure language. No hidden-fee ambiguity.
brand_context.claims_policy: Every benefit should be framed as a product feature, not as a guaranteed financial outcome.
